thoughts.title: He who has a why to live can bear almost any how.
thoughts.content: "He who has a why to live can bear almost any how." — Friedrich Nietzsche

thoughts.title: Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world.
thoughts.content: "Compound interest is the eighth wonder of the world." — Albert Einstein

thoughts.title: The shoe that fits one person pinches another; there is no recipe for living that suits all cases.
thoughts.content: "The shoe that fits one person pinches another; there is no recipe for living that suits all cases." — Carl Jung

thoughts.title: Research is what I'm doing when I don't know what I'm doing.
thoughts.content: "Research is what I'm doing when I don't know what I'm doing." — Wernher von Braun

thoughts.title: An expert is a person who has made all the mistakes that can be made in a very narrow field.

thoughts.title: Trust thyself: every heart vibrates to that iron string.
thoughts.content: "Trust thyself: every heart vibrates to that iron string." — Ralph Waldo Emerson

thoughts.title: The only thing I know is that I know nothing.
thoughts.content: "The only thing I know is that I know nothing." — Socrates

thoughts.title: Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life.
thoughts.content: "Your time is limited, don't waste it living someone else's life." — Steve Jobs

thoughts.title: Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget rule No. 1.
thoughts.content: "Rule No. 1: Never lose money. Rule No. 2: Never forget rule No. 1." — Warren Buffett

thoughts.title: If you are depressed you are living in the past. If anxious, in the future. If at peace, in the present.
thoughts.content: "If you are depressed you are living in the past. If anxious, in the future. If at peace, in the present." — Lao Tzu

thoughts.title: The curious paradox is that when I accept myself just as I am, then I can change.
thoughts.content: "The curious paradox is that when I accept myself just as I am, then I can change." — Carl Rogers

thoughts.title: Be fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful.
thoughts.content: "Be fearful when others are greedy and greedy when others are fearful." — Warren Buffett

thoughts.title: The lack of money is the root of all evil.
thoughts.content: "The lack of money is the root of all evil." — Mark Twain

thoughts.title: Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent.
thoughts.content: "Whereof one cannot speak, thereof one must be silent." — Ludwig Wittgenstein

thoughts.title: Stay hungry, stay foolish.
thoughts.content: "Stay hungry, stay foolish." — Stewart Brand

thoughts.title: The only thing we have to fear is fear itself.
thoughts.content: "The only thing we have to fear is fear itself." — Franklin D. Roosevelt

thoughts.title: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.

thoughts.title: I have a dream.
thoughts.content: "I have a dream." — Martin Luther King Jr.

thoughts.title: Not only is the universe stranger than we imagine, it is stranger than we can imagine.
thoughts.content: "Not only is the universe stranger than we imagine, it is stranger than we can imagine." — Arthur Eddington

thoughts.title: Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood.
thoughts.content: "Nothing in life is to be feared, it is only to be understood." — Marie Curie

thoughts.title: The unexamined life is not worth living.
thoughts.content: "The unexamined life is not worth living." — Socrates

thoughts.title: The harder I work, the luckier I get.
thoughts.content: "The harder I work, the luckier I get." — Gary Player

thoughts.title: Perfection is achieved not when there is nothing more to add, but when there is nothing left to take away.

thoughts.title: Entities should not be multiplied without necessity.

thoughts.title: Whenever you find yourself on the side of the majority, it is time to pause and reflect.

thoughts.title: The best fighter is never angry.
thoughts.content: "The best fighter is never angry." — Lao Tzu

thoughts.title: Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power.
thoughts.content: "Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power." — Abraham Lincoln

thoughts.title: To be is to be perceived.
thoughts.content: "To be is to be perceived." — George Berkeley

thoughts.title: Nature does not hurry, yet everything is accomplished.

thoughts.title: You must be the change you wish to see in the world.

thoughts.title: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.

thoughts.title: The reports of my death are greatly exaggerated.
thoughts.content: "The reports of my death are greatly exaggerated." — Mark Twain

thoughts.content: "The mind is everything. What you think you become." — Buddha

thoughts.title: Price is what you pay. Value is what you get.

thoughts.title: Do what you can, with what you have, where you are.
thoughts.content: "Do what you can, with what you have, where you are." — Theodore Roosevelt

thoughts.title: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
thoughts.content: "Believe you can and you're halfway there." — Theodore Roosevelt

thoughts.title: The purpose of our lives is to be happy.
thoughts.content: "The purpose of our lives is to be happy." — Dalai Lama

thoughts.title: Democracy is the worst form of government, except for all the others.
